socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased attack and cast speed, and mana regeneration. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 10% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Golems grant 17.6 Mana Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Foulborn Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
mutatedMods: Deal 5% increased Damage Over Time per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a warcry, taunting nearby enemies to attack the user and exerting subsequent slam attacks. The user and nearby allies gain a buff that increases their armour and stun threshold.
explicitMods: Knocks back and Interrupts Enemies in a smaller Area
Counts total Power of Enemies in Range
Buff grants 5% more Armour per 5 Power, counting a maximum of 25 Power
Buff grants 15% increased Stun Threshold per 5 Power, counting a maximum of 25 Power
Exerts the next 6 Melee Slam Attacks you perform
Exerted Attacks have 50% more Area of Effect

name: The Grey Wind
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon have Added Fire Damage equal to 13% of Player's Maximum Life
Each Rage also grants +2% to Fire Damage Over Time Multiplier
Nearby Enemies have Fire Exposure while at maximum Rage
flavourText: Silence fell... we gazed upon high.
The Red Pyre flared, palms wide.
Ash-laden gales scoured our flesh.
Four screams became one roar.

name: The Apostate
explicitMods: Gain Maximum Life instead of Maximum Energy Shield from Equipped Armour Items
flavourText: When I finally rejected my faith entirely, my stagnant belief
became thick white blood, as choking as it was nourishing.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Slams the ground, creating a slow wave of churning terrain that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies around them. Using the skill again will stop the previous wave. Requires a Mace, Sceptre, Axe, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: Wave causes Shockwaves from up to 5 Enemies in each Area
Wave has 25% reduced delay between Areas
Wave cannot stop before Damaging 2 Areas
Wave Areas gain +0.3 metres to radius for each previous Area in Wave

no cave, no mountain. Better to die fighting.

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

explicitMods: You have Gloom Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks

flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Blood of the Karui
explicitMods: Recover Full Life at the end of the Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Kaom fought and killed for his people.
Kaom bled for his people.
And so the people gave, the people bled,
So their King might go on."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
